name: webhook-github-push
description: GitHub push event handler — dispatched from webhook-github via sub-workflow. Real deployments would kick a CI build, post to Slack, update a deployment dashboard; this demo logs + summarizes the push.

inputs.expression: ({ handler: 'github-push', repo: ctx.request.body.repo || null, ref: ctx.request.body.ref || null, commits: Array.isArray(ctx.request.body.commits) ? ctx.request.body.commits.length : 0 })
